# CAD Viewer

> CAD Viewer is a free browser-based application for viewing 2D CAD drawings (DWG, DXF) and 3D models (glTF, GLB, OBJ, FBX, STL, IFC) directly from Google Drive™. No software installation required. It is built on the @x-viewer/core WebGL SDK, which uses Three.js for high-performance client-side rendering.

## Application

- [Home](https://cad.thingraph.site/home): Connect Google Drive™ and open CAD files via "Open with"
- [Open Local File](https://cad.thingraph.site/open): Upload and view local DWG, DXF, glTF, GLB, OBJ, FBX, STL, IFC files directly in the browser
- [Example Models](https://cad.thingraph.site/examples): Browse and open example CAD and 3D model files
- [Install](https://cad.thingraph.site/install): Install CAD Viewer from Google Workspace Marketplace
- [Support](https://cad.thingraph.site/support): Documentation, FAQ and contact information

## Supported File Formats

- **DWG** — AutoCAD Drawing files (2D CAD)
- **DXF** — Drawing Exchange Format (2D CAD)
- **glTF / GLB** — GL Transmission Format, JSON and binary variants (3D)
- **OBJ** — Wavefront Object (3D)
- **FBX** — Autodesk Filmbox (3D)
- **STL** — Stereolithography, used in 3D printing (3D)
- **IFC** — Industry Foundation Classes (open BIM / building models) (3D)

## Features

- High-performance WebGL-based 2D rendering for DWG/DXF (Three.js, client-side only, no server)
- 3D model viewer for glTF, GLB, OBJ, FBX, STL, IFC with orbit/pan/zoom
- Layer management: show/hide layers in DWG/DXF drawings
- Layout switching: switch between model space and paper space in multi-layout DWG/DXF
- Measurement tools: distance, area, angle, coordinates with object snapping (osnap)
- Markup and annotation: arrows, rectangles, circles, text with undo/redo
- Screenshot export (PNG)
- Section plane for 3D models
- Tree view for browsing model hierarchy
- Google Drive™ integration: open files via "Open with" without downloading
- Privacy: files are processed entirely in the browser, never uploaded to any server

## Technology

CAD Viewer is built on **@x-viewer/core** and **@x-viewer/plugins** — a TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for building CAD and 3D viewer applications in the browser.

- npm: `@x-viewer/core`, `@x-viewer/plugins`
- Core APIs: `Viewer2d` (DWG/DXF), `Viewer3d` (glTF/OBJ/FBX/STL/IFC)
- Rendering: WebGL via Three.js
- Framework: Vue 3
- SDK examples: https://github.com/thingraph/dwg-viewer-example
- SDK live demos: https://dwg.thingraph.site/

## Install

Google Workspace Marketplace: https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/app/dwg_viewer/641533811831

## Contact
